underlying_goal: Implement a complete 6-phase AI-Powered Schema Builder epic from Trello, including backend models, MCP server, frontend components, agent orchestration, and end-to-end testing
friction_detail: Zod v4 API incompatibility, Docker networking issue with localhost vs host.docker.internal, and ngrok returning HTML instead of JSON for API calls required debugging.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to implement a complete 6-phase AI-Powered Schema Builder epic across multiple repos, and all phases were successfully built, tested, and verified end-to-end.
